svg.title: Cloud DNS name resolution order for GKE
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the correct Cloud DNS resolution order for GKE nodes: cluster-scoped response policy, cluster-scoped private zone, VPC outbound server policy, VPC response policy, VPC managed private zones (longest suffix match), Compute Engine internal DNS, then public DNS.

g.text: GKE 集群级 response 规则
Longest suffix match（最长后缀匹配）
所有 VPC zone 均未命中时

svg.text: 存在时接管 VPC 全部查询
